name: True Random Shuffle
description: The app uses a true random algorithm or quantum random number generator to shuffle songs without repeating them frequently.

name: Smart Shuffle
description: Intelligent shuffle mode that prevents replaying the same songs soon and can adapt to user preferences dynamically.
sources: REAL Shuffle Player[1], Spotify Smart Shuffle[2]
